title: T-023 — UI: FA Core tab (fa_core_tab) — schema-driven form
prompt:
# T-023 — FA Core tab UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §5.2, §5.3, §6.1 Chain 3, ADR-028 + UX fa_core_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:455-517 (fa_core_tab)

## Goal
Client form for FA Core dept (8 base cols + 7 brief extensions) generated dynamically from buildDeptZod('Core'). Auto-derived ingredient_codes is read-only. Triggers cascade Chain 3 on recipe_components save.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/core-tab.tsx 'use client'. RHF + zodResolver(buildDeptZod('Core')). Read-only auto fields (ingredient_codes) styled green. Submit button calls updateFaCell per dirty field; recipe_components dirty triggers chain3 invocation server-side. shadcn Form/Input/Select primitives; closed_core via Select with values from CloseConfirm reference.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/core-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/__tests__/core-tab.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the tab renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:455-517 (fa_core_tab), then it shows the same 8 base + brief extension fields in same order, ingredient_codes is read-only with green background, and uses shadcn Form/Input/Select primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given user edits recipe_components and submits, when Server Action runs, then chain3 is invoked and prod_detail rows sync
3. Given user changes pack_size, when submitted, then chain1 cascade triggers (line+equipment_setup cleared)

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests for parity, chain3 trigger, chain1 trigger
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test core-tab'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode field list (use buildDeptZod)
- Do not allow editing of ingredient_codes
- Do not skip cascade invocations

pipeline_inputs.description: Schema-driven Core tab form using buildDeptZod with cascade triggers on recipe_components and pack_size.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity: 8 base + 7 brief extensions in spec order; auto-derived ingredient_codes read-only green; closed_core via shadcn Select bound to CloseConfirm reference. Cascades chain3 + chain1 invoked server-side via updateFaCell.
out_of_scope: Do not implement other dept tabs (T-024..T-028)
Do not handle Convert-to-PLD pre-fill here

Given user edits recipe_components and submits, when Server Action runs, then chain3 is invoked and prod_detail rows sync
Given user changes pack_size, when submitted, then chain1 cascade triggers (line+equipment_setup cleared)

risk_red_lines: Do not allow editing of ingredient_codes
